title: October 2019 Newsletter
summary: Thanks | New Council members and Election of Officers | Appointments | Call for Nominations | Halibut ABM | Observer Fee Analysis | Trawl EM | Observer Program Draft 2020 Annual Deployment Plan | BSAI Groundfish Harvest Specs | GOA Groundfish Harvest Specs | BSAI Crab Harvest Specs | Sculpins as Ecosystem Component Species | BSAI Pacific cod Pot Catcher Processor Participation | BSAI Pacific Cod Trawl and Pot CV LAPP Scoping Paper | BSAI Pacific cod Parallel Fishery Limited Acces | BSAI and GOA Unused Pacific Cod | Cook Inlet Salmon | Community Engagement Committee | Staff Tasking | Upcoming meetings Thank you, Homer! The Council held its October meeting in Homer, Alaska. We thank everyone in Homer who worked to ensure our meetings and our stay was a success. The meetings on the spit provided incredible views and a stunning background to the daily fish discussions.
